title: Cobblemon Minimons
description: Capture and display mini 3D Pokemon models as decorations!
body: ### [Please consider supporting me on ko-fi if you like the mod and can afford it, I appreciate even 1 dollar. ](https://ko-fi.com/raguto) --- _**I grant permission to anyone seeking to add my mod to a modpack**_ --- Capture and display your favorite pokemon! You can capture their form, shiny status, and anything else to display them on a display case. You can also dye the cases by holding a dye of your desired color and right-clicking the case. Also has multiplayer support in that you can't make a minimon of another players pokemon or wild pokemon, it must be your own, and other players can't access the GUI of your display case. The display case has buttons for animations and size scaling and other features. 1. Craft a Display Case 2. Right-click the desired pokemon to create a minimon 3. Place down the display case and your minimon should appear! ![minimons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0b283bf8a2130b74bb712537753a0428bb6c4c7.png)
